use_cases: Display customer testimonials on SaaS product landing pages to build trust and credibility
Showcase social proof with animated testimonial cards featuring user photos and quotes
Highlight product benefits through diverse user testimonials with role-based attribution
Add credibility to enterprise software pages with testimonial carousels
Engage website visitors with smooth animated testimonial transitions
ai_summary: An animated testimonial carousel component with dark/light mode toggle support. Features framer-motion powered scroll animations, displaying customer testimonials with profile images, names, and roles. Designed for SaaS and enterprise software landing pages to showcase social proof with smooth transitions and professional styling.
